description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1) was traveling east on Alameda Street when it encountered a double-parked vehicle and
 a pedestrian ahead in its lane, as well as two vehicles approaching in the oncoming lane. As the Zoox vehicle gradually slowed to a stop, a 
U-Haul box truck (Vehicle 2) traveling west on Alameda Street began turning left into a U-Haul facility and grazed the left-rear fender of the
 stopped Zoox vehicle. The operator of Vehicle 2 did not stop or return to the Zoox vehicle to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle 
returned to base and was found to have sustained minor damage to the left rear fender. The police were notified, and no injuries were 
reported.
Print
Clear Form
